root_text.an4.239:1.1: “Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.239:1.3: Sāvajjena kāyakammena, sāvajjena vacīkammena, sāvajjena manokammena, sāvajjāya diṭṭhiyā—
root_text.an4.239:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.239:2.1: Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an4.239:2.3: Anavajjena kāyakammena, anavajjena vacīkammena, anavajjena manokammena, anavajjāya diṭṭhiyā—
root_text.an4.239:2.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an4.239:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.239:1.3: Blameworthy deeds by way of body, speech, and mind, and blameworthy view.
translation_text.an4.239:1.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.239:2.1: Someone with four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.239:2.3: Blameless deeds by way of body, speech, and mind, and blameless view.
translation_text.an4.239:2.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
